_comment: Invalid: emission violates §6.2.C5 (accessibility preservation) — an ARIA role declared in the source pattern's accessibility contract is not present in the emission. Per §6.3 Level 2+ requirements, ARIA preservation is mandatory; this MUST be flagged as non-conformant for any Level 2 or Level 3 claim.

fidelityEvidence._failureNote: Source pattern @quoin/pattern-tabs declares role="tablist", role="tab", role="tabpanel" in its accessibility contract. The emission renders <ul><li> elements without role attributes, violating §6.2.C5.
